summary: Completed initial testing of Oxford dating app MVP. Critical authentication issue identified - login works but subsequent API calls fail with 401 errors. Frontend components have React errors affecting filter functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication cookies not being sent with requests after successful login
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access any protected content after login - core app functionality broken
critical_bugs.details: Login returns 200 OK but subsequent requests return 401 Unauthorized. Cookies appear to not be set or sent correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.impact: Filter dialog cannot open, preventing users from filtering profiles

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button remains disabled even with valid Oxford email

integration_issues.issue: All protected API calls fail with 401 after successful login
integration_issues.details: Frontend correctly uses withCredentials: true but cookies not being sent

passed_tests: Login form accepts credentials and redirects

success_percentage.backend: 30% - Basic endpoints work but authentication broken
success_percentage.frontend: 40% - UI loads but core functionality broken due to auth issues

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication cookie handling. Cookies are not being properly set or sent after login, causing all protected endpoints to return 401. Also fix SelectItem component errors in filter dialog.
